reviews.text:
I had the privilege of working with Donna Lattarulo, Attorney,, and I can wholeheartedly say that my experience was nothing short of exceptional. Donna proved to be a dedicated and highly skilled professional, embodying the qualities one hopes to find in an attorney. Her commitment to her clients, excellent communication, honesty, and reasonable pricing make her stand out in the legal field.

From the very beginning, I was impressed by Donna's thorough approach to my case. She demonstrated a profound understanding of the law and was meticulous in her research and preparation. Her attention to detail was evident throughout every step of the legal process, ensuring that my case was handled with the utmost care.

One of Donna's standout attributes is her exceptional communication skills. She kept me informed at every stage of my case, promptly responding to my inquiries and providing clear and concise explanations of complex legal matters. Her ability to translate legal jargon into understandable terms is a testament to her dedication to client understanding and empowerment.

Honesty is a rare and cherished quality in the legal profession, and Donna embodies it. She was upfront about the strengths and weaknesses of my case, allowing me to make well-informed decisions. Her transparency and ethical approach to law set her apart, making her a trusted advocate for her clients.

Donna's pricing structure is both fair and reasonable. I was pleasantly surprised by her commitment to offering cost-effective legal services without compromising on quality. This combination of affordability and exceptional service makes her a standout choice for anyone in need of legal representation.

In conclusion, Donna Lattarulo, Attorney at Law, is a remarkable legal professional who goes above and beyond to serve her clients. Her thoroughness, excellent communication, honesty, and reasonable pricing are qualities that set her apart from her peers. I am grateful for the positive experience I had working with Donna and would highly recommend her to anyone seeking outstanding legal representation.

Attorney Lattarulo has represented our agency for over 25 years in housing matters, parliamentary procedures for public meetings and just about any major challenge that faces us.  As the Executive Director, I work almost daily with attorney Lattarulo.  She is responsive to my calls which is rare in the legal field.  She is always professional and prepared.  There is no one more knowledgeable about Connecticut housing law.  She is excellent at representing us in court and even better at keeping us out of trouble.  I highly recommend Attorney Donna Lattarulo.

Attorney Lattarulo is highly professional and detailed oriented. We used her for the sale of our condo and could not have been happier. She was knowledgeable and her fees were reasonable. We highly recommend her and will be retaining her services in the near future.
Kras Carlucci

I have worked with Ms. Lattarulo on a number of closings, Wills and other personal documents.  She has always been extremely honest, professional and knowledgeable.  I would highly recommend her and her work to all seeking a confident and skilled attorney.
Attorney Pelletreau is an open and honest lawyer. He is up front with his clients and sets realistic expectations. Thank you for helping me throughout the years.

Mr. Haase of TDH LAW LLC, came highly recommended to me! His expertise and knowledge of the insurance and medical side of the law as it pertained to my injuries and loss of work and property, couldn't have been more professional and helpful!!! Thank you, David M
reviews.ownerResponse: David, Happy Holidays! It was a pleasure working for you. Thanks again for putting your trust in my firm.

reviews.text:
Initially, I was very reluctant to get involved in a legal situation. I had never been involved in a car accident, let alone filing a personal injury claim. When I met with Attorney Haase, I found him to be very understanding, patient, and knowledgeable. His low-key,  calming approach was very much appreciated as I was upset about what had happened to me and also in physical pain. Once he walked me through the process, I had the confidence to go ahead—and I’m so glad I did!
Attorney Haase is excellent at what he does. I was pleasantly surprised by the settlement he negotiated for me and  I sincerely recommend him to anyone in need of legal services!
reviews.ownerResponse: Nancy, I am happy that you are pleased with the legal services that were provided. You were a pleasure to work with.

reviews.text:
Todd Haase was a pleasure to work with. I was referred to him by my chiropractor after I was hit on RT-15. Atty Haase made the handling of my case extremely simple for me. He was always immediately responsive when I reached out for an update and the few times I had to come to the office for anything it took no more than 5 minutes of my time.

My medical bills were significant (5 figures!!), so when the settlement offer came Todd pushed back and got the insurance company to raise their final number twice. He also reached out and successfully got some of my medical bills reduced, just so that much more would end up back in my own pocket.

I'm very grateful to have had Atty Haase as a partner through this experience. I've never pursued legal action for anything prior to this accident, and he provided me with very fair, caring and honest council. I absolutely recommend Todd Haase.
reviews.ownerResponse: Lisa, thank you for your kind words. I am glad that we were able to secure a fair settlement for you that compensated you for your injuries. Please reach out if I can be of help in the future.

reviews.text: Working with Attorney Haase was a positive experience. No one ever "wants" to seek the help of an attorney, especially when you've been involved in a bad car accident. Where I am an empath and easily affected by emotions, Todd was always level-headed, straight and to the point. In this way, we made a good team of opposite personalities. Todd helped keep our case on track, and we were able to settle our case without a big fanfare legal trial, thankfully. Todd will work hard on your behalf, to defend your rights and to get you a fair settlement. Thank you, Todd!

I am so grateful to my friends who recommended I reach out to Atty Haase after I was rear ended by a driver who fled the scene. I mistakenly thought I had no recourse but thanks to his help I was able to get medical attention for the back and neck pain I had from the accident and though the process took time was even able to receive a nice payment from the insurance company which has been great help. Atty Haase was a pleasure to work with throughout the process, he was very knowledgeable, kept me informed throughout the process, and was responsive whenever I did have a question. I highly recommend Atty Haase for anyone involved in a car accident or is in need of a personal injury attorney.

Todd was very diligent in my case where I was blamed for liability after being hit head on by on coming car. The car was driven by a cop and my statement was not even recorded by the reporting investigator. Todd was sure to get my statement included in the police report and get the liability moved to the proper party for running the light. It was a long process but Todd stayed on top of the case and was able to get my health payments covered, vehicle paid off, and a settlement for my trouble. TDH Law saved me from being held accountable at the hands of injustice. I recommend Todd for any case that needs to be handled with care!
Todd and his team are professionals through and through. TDH law is experienced, caring and results oriented. Todd is a great litigator and I would recommend him to anyone!
Atty Haase did an excellent job of representing me after my car accident. Highly recommend

From the moment I first spoke with Todd Haase I liked how knowledgeable and transparent he was. He only took on my “slip and fall” case once he carefully reviewed the facts. Then he met with me and explained how everything works and what it involves. There was no hidden agenda.
Todd handled everything and I fully trusted him with every step of the process including the settlement negotiation. This in fact exceeded my expectations and I could not have been happier with the results. I had many questions before, during and after the case resolution and he answered them all promptly, clearly, and concisely.
I would recommend Todd to friends and family at any time.

I do not typically share negative experiences publicly however, I felt this was necessary to share in order to help others.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Mr. Leonardo,

I'm sorry that you were unhappy with your experience working with me. I always strive to get the best results I can for my clients. Unfortunately, pursuant to the Rules of Practice, I am ethically not allowed to give you a copy of your file which I explained to you when you asked for them. This is also why I requested you come to the office and review it with me. With regard to your statement that I have not shared the file with your current attorney I checked to make sure it did not get overlooked. I am relieved to tell you that I emailed the file to your new attorney the first week of November. Finally, my retainer agreement states, and I always tell my clients, I can make no promises or guarantees because ultimately the discretionary power to resolve your case does not reside with me. As I told you the last time I saw you and notwithstanding your current review, I sincerely hope you get the best result possible in your current legal matter.

reviews.text: Paul Slager and Nicole Coates handled my personal injury case, procuring a substantial award in arbitration. From our first meeting, they were warm, kind, empathetic, and gentle, helping me to navigate an incredibly challenging healing process. At every turn, they remained focused on what I needed to feel empowered and witnessed. They were flexible and patient, and went down some unusual and creative paths at my request. In a field that can be quite delicate and fraught, they were always sensitive to my needs and wellbeing, and I remain extremely grateful for their support and their professionalism.

Nicole Coates and Paul Slager are exceptionally skilled, professional, and results-driven attorneys. Their team is not only highly skilled but also relentlessly aggressive when it comes to fighting for their clients best outcomes. They communicate clearly, provide consistent updates throughout the process, and make you feel fully supported every step of the way.

If you are looking for attorneys who combine compassion with tenacity and truly advocate for their clients, I strongly recommend working with them. I am incredibly grateful for their dedication and guidance during such a difficult time.

Paul, Nicole, and the entire team at Slager Madry are supremely skilled, effective, honest, patient, and compassionate. If you seek legal counsel, look no further; you will be in caring and capable hands.

The team at Slager Madry are top notch.  They are compassionate, dedicated, professional and knowledgeable.   But best of all, they made it personal…

At each step of the way we were able to reach out to Attorneys Paul Slager and Nicole Coates personally.  We never felt like just another case, or that we had to go through an answering service to get in touch with them.  When we reached out, they always responded.

They took time to learn about our family situation on a personal level.  Beyond just what we needed for the legal matter, they listened and they cared.

As my sisters and I went through this process, when questions came up they would answer via email, phone call or zoom—whichever worked best for us, at all different times of day.  They would check in with each one of us personally to make each of our questions were answered and we were all comfortable in the direction.

All of that was matched by their legal expertise, strategic thinking and a steady, calming hand guiding us through the entire process.

I’ll forever be grateful to Paul, Nicole and the entire team.  I absolutely, without any reservation, recommend them.  You will not find a better combination of kindness and competence.

There are very few words that can describe the level of expertise and care that was provided by the Slager Madry team. Some that come to mind are: exemplary, steadfast, intuitive, honest, compassionate, principled, communicative, patient, strategic, and just simply incredible. Paul and Nicole led the charge to help our family through an impossible time and we were able to cross a finish line with a feeling of justice and peace. Those are gifts that I am utterly confident no other team could have given us. I am thankful for the rest of my life for their work.

My experience with Slager Madry was truly exceptional. Every member of their team treated me with kindness, respect, and professionalism. I always felt heard, supported, and valued, and their genuine care made a lasting impression. I wholeheartedly recommend them to anyone seeking a compassionate and trustworthy legal team.

Paul and his fabulous team got us legal justice, maximum enforcement of consequences and for that they are a part of our family forever! #MedicalMalpractice #PatientRights #LegalHelp #JusticeForPatients

I want to express my deepest gratitude to the entire team at Slager Madry. My journey began with Attorney Paul Slager and Attorney Nicole Coates at their former firm and concluded at their new firm, Slager Madry. From day one until the very end, they demonstrated an extraordinary level of professionalism. What truly stood out to me, though, were their kindness, compassion, and the respectful way they treated me throughout this difficult process.
I had gone through extremely challenging times as the victim of medical malpractice. Attorney Paul Slager believed in me from the beginning and accepted my case when I felt my most vulnerable. He represented me with unwavering dedication, ultimately achieving a very positive settlement outcome. I am profoundly grateful to both Paul and Nicole for everything they have done.
The entire team worked with remarkable attention to detail and commitment. Their professionalism made it possible for me to feel that justice had been served. At every step, they met me with empathy, patience, and respect. Their loyalty to their client—something I had never expected to this degree—was truly remarkable.
During this process, I was overwhelmed emotionally, managing serious health challenges, and facing extensive paperwork. The team made everything feel manageable.
If you believe you may have a case, I can say with complete sincerity that Attorney Paul Slager and Nicole Coates are exceptional advocates. I don’t know if all attorneys are as genuinely human and caring as they are, but I feel incredibly fortunate to have had such an outstanding experience. In the end, everything turned out well, and I wish the entire Slager Madry team continued success in helping others who have suffered from medical malpractice.

The team at Slager Madry is truly exceptional - professional, compassionate, and dedicated in every way. During one of the hardest times of our lives, Attorney Paul Slager became not only an expert advocate but also a compassionate ally to our family. From start to finish, we met directly with the attorneys handling our case, which made us feel seen and valued rather than just another number.

Our case was deeply complex, and the Slager Madry team went above and beyond to find the right experts to represent it accurately and effectively. At every stage, their communication, empathy, and professionalism were unwavering.

Our family suffered an immeasurable loss with the passing of a beloved husband and father. Attorney Slager took the time to truly learn who he was, ensuring he represented him with dignity and understanding. While nothing can replace our loss, this firm honored our loved one and made us feel that seeking justice was both meaningful and necessary.

We will forever be grateful to Attorney Slager, Attorney Randall, and the entire Slager Madry team for the justice they brought to our family and the care they showed throughout the process.

This firm has helped me tremendously and supported me every step of the way. The entire team is professional, caring, and truly dedicated to their clients. They always made me feel heard and kept me informed throughout the process. I’m so grateful for their hard work, honesty, and commitment. They represented us for almost two years and were always ten steps ahead of the opposing counsel. They were infinitely more knowledgeable, strategic and wiser. This was an enormous peace of mind during an incredibly taxing season of my life. I was distraught about the entire situation, having never experienced anything like it, so it was also incredibly meaningful to me that, not only did they bring expertise, but they are also people of the highest ethics and integrity.

I feel indebted to them in the same way I would to a surgeon who saved my life. The difference is that a surgeon commits hours to your well-being, whereas Slager Madry advocated for me with wisdom and kindness for years of their professional lives.

My father was a municipal employee with over 37 years of service.  Dad enjoyed working and therefore did not want to retire and kept working.  He passed unexpectedly.  In that he had not retired, he passed without applying for his pension.  Nor was there a will.

My father, a Veteran, also worked for the State of Connecticut and had taken early retirement from that job.  When my father passed, Attorney Lasko advised and worked with me on the probate of my father’s estate.  Through some sort of administrative oversight, both the State and Municipality denied my mother any survivorship rights in either of my father’s pensions.  As to both pensions, somehow, at the time of my father’s demise, the state and municipality had my father listed as a single person, [which was not the case] and used that as a basis to deny benefits to my mother.  Attorney Lasko was retained on these issues and fought with both the municipality and the State on these issues.  Through dogged determination, unwavering commitment, keen legal insight and a great deal of tenacity, while avoiding protracted litigation with the municipality, Attorney Lasko was able to obtain a full lifetime annuity for my mother as her entitled survivor benefits in my father’s municipal pension.  Attorney Lasko’s keen insight and quick action saved the day and prevented irretrievable municipal action which could have severely jeopardized my mother’s rights.   As to my father’s state pension, through an unwavering fight of  administrative appeals at the State level and court action, Attorney Lasko was able render from the State my mother’s full survivor benefits in my Father’s state Pension.  With these funds, my mother was able to more fully provide for the needs of herself and family.

For timely, tempered, quick action in Critical Matters, I recommend Attorney Lasko. Attorney Lasko does not quit, he leaves no stone unturned and delivers results beyond expectations!  Especially when it comes to issues of pension Rights!

When I needed legal assistance with a work-related issue, I learned that most labor lawyers focus more on workers compensation matters and do not want to work with public employees, particularly those in unions.  After being turned down by one labor lawyer after another, I was very fortunate to find and secure the legal services of Attorney William Lasko.  Attorney Lasko has a strong background in labor and union law which was invaluable in working through my issues.  I highly recommend him to public employees and others who are faced with labor issues.

Bill was tenacious with the two insurance companies that were involved. He was a bulldog with the way he went about handling my case. He kept the expenses to a minimum and negotiated a maximum settlement. Bill kept me apprised every step of the way and there were never any surprises. He exceeded all my expectations. I could not be happier with Bill as an attorney and would recommend him to anyone.
Mr. Lasko is a highly skilled attorney.  His firm is  attentive and knowledgeable to the law. I would highly recommend him.

I recently sat down with Mr. Lasko regarding a CHRO/EEOC complaint against my former employer. After 1.5 hours I was ready to be done. But things were just warming up.

Mr. Lasko often went on short tangents about things unrelated to determining if I had a case worth pursuing. Most of which were personal opinions that he treated as fact. Here are a couple of the better tangents that he went on. He told me that he doesn’t believe I have a mental disorder, even though I have two medical providers saying otherwise. That was after he told me that my medical provider in charge of prescribing my medications was a fraud because she was an APRN, not a MD. Others were about podcasts I needed to listen to, books I needed to read, or the same court rulings/laws I needed to check out over and over again.

At the hour and a half point of my consultation, after one of his tangents, I did tell him that I could not afford to go into a second hour, but he kept pushing on. He did end up capping my price at $450, which is good, because he probably would have kept blabbing and made me pay for the full 3 hrs, if not more.

Upon using PayPal (which seems highly unprofessional for a lawyer) to create my consultation invoice, he continually spelled my email wrong. Even after many times of correcting him. He ended up sending it to some email, but it wasn’t mine. It was spelled wrong again. I ended up having to just put in my CC info at his computer as the email he sent didn’t arrive. Obviously.

He did seem knowledgeable about the subject matter, but given the added fluff, there is no way I’d hire him to represent me.

If you find yourself going into a consultation with Mr. Lasko, do not make the same mistakes I did. Pay for the first hour, watch the clock, and do not entertain him when he gets off the case matter. He will ramble right through each hour if you let him.

Needless to say, I never expected I'd need legal representation, but when I needed a lawyer's help (as a result of poor judgement on my part, with respect to motor vehicle offenses), I turned to Michael, and I'm very glad that I did.  His wisdom and fierce representation of my interests led to the best possible outcome, and I am very grateful.  I've been telling my friends about Michael's excellent work, and I'm happy to share my story here in this Google review. (Another, less favorable review that I see here on Google seems rather hard to believe, as Michael handled himself with great compassion -- as well as wisdom and strength -- in my situation.  I'm glad that I have this opportunity to set the record straight.)

reviews.text:
Update: As expected, I am very disappointed with Mr. Kratter's reply. My uncle tells me that he never asked you to not talk to me. I nicely called your office one day to inform you that my uncle was not able to go to the appointment, and then I asked your secretary if I could speak to you, and she told me that yes, I can speak to you. She asked me to call you at the time of the appointment and she was going to transfer me. I had the authorization to talk to you regarding the case because my uncle gave you that authorization personally in one of our calls, and I was there. Then, your secretary took the initiative to call my uncle, and somehow, I found myself suddenly blocked from helping my family. This is very infuriating and sad. Now, what was the result of the case? He did not get divorced, and we paid you for that, and he keeps living in the basement of his house, almost blind, with inhumane living conditions as we have on video.

Also, you never asked me to stop calling. I did not even call you that often. I stopped calling right after your secretary told me that I was not authorized to talk to you anymore. At that point, I knew that you were not going to help my family.

By the way, I have no idea who Sara is, but I agree with her review.

I’ve never written a review in my life so I’ll start by saying that if you are looking for a lawyer Kevin is definitely the one to hire.  From his courtroom presence to his grasp and understanding of my case, he’s not only the best lawyer I’ve had he’s the best lawyer I’ve ever seen in real life.

Smart, concise and buttoned-up all describe Kevin’s legal style.  I talked to Kevin on a Friday, met with him the following Monday for a court date the very next day. By Tuesday morning he had a thorough understanding of my case. All while keeping me calm during an incredibly stressful time.

Usually with someone as talented as Kevin you’d say that after he was made they broke the mold. However; in this case his son (Kevin Jr.), who also helped extensively with my case, is a smart and accomplished lawyer in his own right.

This isn’t even about whether or not he won (he did, of course) but rather the fact that he understood my case inside and out and argued it forcefully yet professionally. In short, if you are looking for a lawyer that will really pay attention to your case and not just “go through the motions”, Kevin Black is the one. If you need a lawyer and don’t hire him you’re making a mistake.

What stood out most was Kevin's strength as a litigator. Given my prior negative experiences, I had significant concerns but he exceeded my expectations. He was well-prepared, confident, direct, and consistently focused on doing what was right and necessary for my case.

reviews.text: My federal criminal case was broadcasted all over the country. Being in federal court is one of the most intimidating experiences one can experience. When i was charged, even before my case was fully heard, i was left without a job, and was even told by my University that i may not be able to graduate. Steve helped with all of these matters, in addition to resolving my federal case. I am now employed, with two degrees, and my case was resolved in a way that preserved my freedom and my dignity.  I don't know what my family and i would have done without Stephen Seeger. I can never fully repay him for the eloquent and tenacious fight he put up for me in federal court. God bless him!

reviews.text:
Five Stars

I cannot put into words how incredibly grateful I am for Attorney Alicia P. Chalumeau and her exceptional representation throughout my highly contentious divorce and custody proceedings. From the very beginning, I was at a severe disadvantage when it came to maintaining any meaningful contact with my 2-year-old son—but Alicia changed the trajectory of my case in ways I never thought possible.

Her professionalism, strategic insight, and command of family law were immediately apparent. Alicia not only guided me through an extremely complex and emotional process, but she did so with empathy, precision, and an unwavering commitment to justice. It was clear at every stage that she cared deeply—not just about the case, but about me as a person, and most importantly, about my son’s well-being.

Her law firm worked tirelessly and meticulously, preparing every argument, anticipating every move, and ultimately delivering results that far exceeded even our most hopeful expectations. The judge’s final verdict was a dramatic shift in my favor—something I truly did not think was possible at the outset. That outcome is a testament to Alicia’s brilliance, her heart, and her relentless advocacy.

I would recommend Attorney Chalumeau without a second’s hesitation—especially to fathers who feel the system is stacked against them. She is the advocate you want in your corner, and I will continue to do everything I can to ensure she remains by my side as my son grows. Simply put: she is the best of the best.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your 5-star review!

Alicia was the best decision I could have made for my separation/child custody case. She is respectful, honest, optimistic, compassionate, and an ace in the courtroom. She knows family law extremely well, and while attempts to reach mutual agreements with both parties, is not intimidated with taking it to court when needed.
Alicia is a big proponent of Fathers' rights, which is the primary reason I sought her out. She believes in fairness and understands that men still tend to get the bad end of the deal in many cases. Without going into specifics, when it looked like I had little hope, Alicia completely turned everything into my favor unequivocally. I can't say enough for what she did and how she handled my situation. Entering the courtroom and going before the judge and opposition, we felt more like a team then as attorney/client. She is not afraid to battle for what is right and has my utmost respect. I owe her much gratitude and cannot say enough about her or the impact she had on my life. I now consider her a friend and would whole heartedly recommend her to anyone needing a family law attorney. More specifically, fathers who have been wronged or just want fair & equal treatment.
Thanks for everything Alicia.

I was so disappointed with this firm. The pleadings submitted in the case were weak, putting me potentially at a disadvantage. I did not feel Creager was neither representing nor fighting for me. The Plaintiff's attorney was also located at the same address with an office too close for comfort. It became obvious after the initial hearing that Creager was intimidated by and too friendly with the Plaintiff's attorney and clear they both intended for this case to go to trial in order to reap financial benefits. Seven months of wasted time later and with no talk of settlement, I changed attorneys.  Allan F. Friedman in Stamford was able to settle the case to mutual satisfaction within a matter of weeks.

Pulled the ultimate bait & switch. Wasted almost a year of my life and then decided to quadruple his "estimate" of proceeding with case.  Formal complaint to the state bar association is being drafted.  Be careful.

Exceptional Attorney - Strategic, Responsive, and Cost-Conscious
I retained Nicole to represent me in a high-conflict divorce and custody matter. She exceeded my expectations in every way.
Strategic and Fearless: Nicole has the courage to push back when needed and isn't afraid to take bold positions when the situation calls for it. She knows when to be aggressive and when to hold back - that strategic judgment is invaluable in family law cases.
Cost-Conscious Approach: Unlike many attorneys who rack up unnecessary billable hours, Nicole was mindful of costs throughout the process. She handled almost everything virtually until the negotiation day, which was incredibly convenient and cost-effective. She didn't waste time or money on unnecessary motions or posturing.
Clear Communication: Nicole explained every step in detail, always providing the legal context so I understood not just what was happening but why. She was extremely responsive - and on the rare occasions she couldn't respond immediately, she always gave me a heads up. I never felt left in the dark.
Trust Built Over Time: Nicole took the time to understand my priorities and never lost sight of my objectives. She built trust through consistent, honest advice even when I didn't want to hear it.
Excellent Support Staff: Her office staff was very accommodating in setting up meetings and working around my schedule. The entire team made the process as smooth as possible during a difficult time.
Results: Nicole achieved the outcomes I fought for. The virtual process was convenient and efficient, and I'm very satisfied with the final settlement.
If you're facing a divorce or custody matter in Connecticut and want an attorney who will fight strategically, communicate clearly, and respect your budget, I highly recommend Nicole.

This firm and its lawyers are absolutely fantastic. Ashley Albini and Eric Broder, in particular, handled my high-conflict divorce custody case with utmost humility, grace, and expertise. They are truly the best of the best. Ashley is one of the most exceptional lawyers I’ve ever encountered, and Eric is no exception. They have not only provided legal counsel but have also offered financial assistance. They are unwavering in their commitment to fighting for what is right and just. I highly recommend this firm to anyone facing a divorce case.

Mark D’Augelli Jr. was able to step in at the last minute and help me navigate a difficult situation quickly and efficiently. He got up to speed fast, was practical and responsive, and worked with me on cost to make the process as painless as possible. I’m very grateful for his help and would highly recommend him.
Stacy was an absolute joy to work with. Highly recommend using this firm due to the professional manner in which they handle their clients.

Mark D'Augelli represented me with kindness, thoroughness, and professionalism. I'm grateful for Mark's complete understanding of my case and his brilliant appearances in court. I would strongly recommend Mark, Chris DeMattie and the entire supportive team at Broder, Orland, Murray & DeMattie.

I cannot speak highly enough of Sue and her team Stacy and Mark at Broder Orland Murray & Demattie. From the very beginning, their expertise, diligence, and meticulous attention to detail were unmatched. They treated me not just as a client, but with the care and compassion - gently guiding me through a process I had avoided for over a year out of fear and emotional overwhelm.

Though none of us anticipated how unnecessarily complicated my case would become, they quickly understood the dynamics - not just in theory, but in action. They picked up on every nuance and knew exactly how to navigate with precision and grace. They were amazing at dumbing things down for me and helping me to understand a process that was 100% foreign to me.

What stood out most was their honesty. They never overpromised or sold me a certain outcome. Instead, they laid out every possible scenario with clarity and compassion, always staying aligned with our shared values of transparency and integrity.

Sue, Mark, and Stacy never let me spiral into fear or self-doubt. They handled every appearance, every twist, every detail- start to finish, with calm confidence and unwavering support. I felt supported, protected, and truly seen. I’m deeply grateful for their partnership and would recommend them to anyone seeking not just legal excellence, but true human care. They have become like family and I owe them a great deal!

I am truly grateful for the outstanding professionalism provided by Broder Orland Murray & Demattie Law Firm, where I was lucky to work Eric Broder and Sue Georgiades. I want to express a very sincere and big appreciation to Sue Georgiades with whom I received not only great expertise and guidance throughout a long and complex process but her insight, approach, and care exceeded by far my expectations and made a meaningful difference in navigating difficult situations. Sue's work brought structure, organization, and positive value to my family, and I deeply appreciate her dedication and skill.I highly recommend Sue Georgiades and her firm to anyone seeking thoughtful, effective, and a great performing powerful Lawyer and team.

I can’t say enough about Eric and Michael. They were always there - knowledgeable, empathetic, and patient. I feel fortunate to have them on my side.

Wish I would have started the process with Eric instead of having to switch to him late in the game.  I would have been far better educated on how the entire process works and it would have gotten done far faster.

Eric also has command of complex estate and business structuring matters and doesnt have to hire a consultant to spell it all out.

Ego, bravado, an inflated sense of importance, and lack of ownership lead the way.
Lost post-judgment motion for modification of parenting plan to a self-represented party.
Dumped before the Memorandum of Decision, then asked to forward it.
The existing parenting plan is worse than when we started.
Only attentive and care when called out.
Excellent at generating revenue for the firm.

Suppose you're looking for a true professional who cares, listens, and is attentive. In that case, Eric Posmantier is the attorney who will deliver the absolute best results and help you understand the process along the way. My now wife used him, and I should have, too.

I am truly grateful for the expertise and dedication of both Mark and Eric. They represented me with professionalism, thoroughness, and genuine care. Their calm demeanor, kindness, and unwavering professionalism made a difficult personal process, both smooth and reassuring. I would strongly encourage anyone in need of legal guidance to place their trust in  both Mark and Eric, along with the entire team at Broder, Orland, Murray & DeMattie.

Eric Broder and Mark D'Augelli, Jr. guided me through my divorce with a rare combination of professionalism, and care. They were consistently responsive, offering clear, strategic advice at every step. What stood out most was their ability to discern when to stand firm and when to let go—always with my best interests at the forefront.
Eric and Nicole are truly the best. Their creative solutions have saved me from years of headaches.

I was very fortunate enough to be recommended Nicole from a good friend of mine.
The way she is with her words in the courtroom is indescribable, you have to witness it yourself and then you will be amazed.
I never would’ve imagined somebody who is as sweet as she is,  to be that much of a pitbull when needed to be.
She is a straight shooter, as professional as one can be, and is an attorney you want to be represented by.

I had such a great experience with her.
She will always be my number 1 recommendation.!!!

Nicole DiGiose is a commited, compassionate and determined lawyer dedicated to helping her clients. Nicole came into my divorce proceedings when I was in need of redirection and she helped drive a successful completion. Nicole even made herself available to answer a few post-judgement questions when they arose, illustrating her dedication to her clients doesn’t just end when the bill is paid. A true professional and caring human, you want Attorney DiGiose on your side!

I worked with Nicole DiGiose and I had a great experience. She and her team are very responsive. You are kept in the loop during the whole process. Nicole is considerate of the emotional challenges that come in dealing with divorce and listens to your needs. She really fights for you! I would recommend her to anyone.

I needed a CT lawyer for a multi-state child support modification.  After calling multiple law firms with no one wanting to assist, Robert Vossler stepped in and saved the day.  As others have stated, he helped make a stressful experience less painful.  Highly recommend this group and especially Robert Vossler.

Not only is Eric Broder an incredibly knowledgable attorney he also has a perfect bedside manner when handling what is obviously an immensely stressful experience to begin with.  He replies quickly, with detailed knowledge of each situation and communicates with a level confidence and compassion that made my divorce experience so much less painful that it could have been.  And when it was all signed off on looking back he was spot on on every perspective, opinion, legal facts etc...  Could not say better things about my experience with his firm.

Attorney Robert Vossler handled my extremely difficult divorce/ custody battle with a very high conflict co-parent. Robert Vossler was always there when I needed him. He was very quick with responses to all my questions. Robert is smart, intelligent and very knowledgeable, It was very reassuring having him by my side through one of the worst experiences I have ever gone through. In the end I won full legal custody!!! Job well done

Nicole Digiose was exceptional to work with. Everything about a divorce is stressful, but Nicole was absolutely incredible to work with. Nicole was always easy to get ahold of, took the time to explain things that didn’t make sense and made the process as smooth as it could have been. I would recommend Nicole to anyone! It was Nicole’s thoughtfulness, empathy and attention to detail that seems to separate her from her peers!

Sue Georgiades and Eric Broder were a great team.  They were professional and diligent resolving a complex divorce.  They made good on their promises and always tried to find ways to efficiently resolve matters.
Eric is one of a kind. Extremely bright, quick, responsive, and knowledgeable, yet caring and understanding at the same time. I felt very grateful to have him in my corner. Highly recommend.

Nicole DiGiose's professional expertise and personable manner made what could have been a difficult and frustrating experience simple and comfortable. She was reliable, accessible and responsive throughout the process, and her billing practices were fair and reasonable. She truly made me feel like I had a concerned partner on the journey. I wholeheartedly recommend her.

Maneuvering through my divorce was the most stressful and emotional experiences of my life. The expertise of the legal team at Broder, Orland, Murray and DeMattie provided me with the confidence needed to remain calm and focus on what was important.

Christopher DeMattie and Michael Chirco guided me through the entire process and continued to help me navigate difficult issues even months after the execution of our Settlement Agreement.  Their guidance and approach was spot on and I always had a sense that they were resolution oriented moving through the process as efficiently and intelligently as possible.
Divorce is never easy even if it is mutual.  Eric Broder was so supportive and always "in my corner".  I continue to call on him when issues arise.  I would recommend him wholeheartedly!

Divorce is one of the most stressful, complex, conflictual, and time-consuming experiences an individual can have.  For those looking to increase calm, clarity, and confidence during this difficult time, I recommend working with the legal team at Broder, Orland, Murray & DeMattie LLC.  After working with Ashley Albini and Eric Broder, I continue to be impressed with their balance of compassion and creative advocacy, which allowed them to pivot quickly, to address issues as they unfolded, and to provide options for conflict resolution.  The responsiveness of Attorneys Albini and Broder allowed me to confidently discern the next step toward the dissolution of my marriage.

I cannot begin to express the gratitude I feel for having had Eric Broder and Sarah Murray advocate for me and my kids through my divorce.  Their advice was always spot on and kept my kids and their long term needs at the forefront. They understand the legal, emotional, financial and personal implications of ending a marriage better than any one.  My divorce was not an easy one (are they ever?) and they continually provided insight into ways to approach the financial, parenting and legal challenges so that they could be as streamlined as possible.  For example, when my ex and I came up with a parenting plan that we thought was quite comprehensive and well thought out, they identified gaps and concerns related to ways things would change as the kids got older, something that we had failed to consider.  This saved us time back in court and heartache and struggle as well.  I think it's also really important to state that Sarah and Eric are just really good people to work with.  They are ethical, thoughtful, kind, compassionate and responsive people.  The divorce process can be so painful but working with them made the experience so much less so.  I cannot recommend them highly enough.

I found Attorney Sarah Murray's counsel to be based in extensive subject matter expertise, pragmatic and very thoughtful and her and the team's approach responsive and flexible. I'd highly recommend her as an excellent resource.

Nicole Digiose has been a true gift for me and my children. She is beyond a doubt the attorney you want on your side especially if it’s a high conflict situation. She is the first attorney who saw immediately what I was dealing with, acted accordingly and always in my best interest. She is understanding, calming, and incredibly effective through the process and in court. She is tough and formidable when needed, and highly intelligent. I can’t imagine surviving my ongoing high conflict situation without her as my attorney. Words really can’t express how appreciative my children and I are for her!!

I worked with Nicole DiGiose through the entire course of my difficult divorce.  From the first moment, she was a rock star.  Consummately professional, reasonable, smart, wiley and wise…she helped me win my case against a former spouse who was taking the low road.  I can not say enough good things about her and the entire firm.  I have recommended her to friends in similar situations.  1000% I recommend her.

Attorney Robb Vossler gave me prompt attention and excellent service in an incredibly important year-long post judgment custody case. It was exactly what I needed. He billed fairly and honestly. Robb showed deep knowledge and experience, and also had great resources from his firm to draw from. He cared about my situation and my kids and I'm very glad I chose him to represent me. I hope I don't ever need an attorney again. But if I do, Robb's my guy.

I worked with Sarah Murray and Sue Georgiades and found them to be knowledgeable, thoughtful, detailed, and balanced. They did a great job working with me, working with opposing counsel, and overall, I recommend them highly to anyone who finds themselves in this difficult process.

Attorney Nicole made a scary and tough situation not as overwhelming but rather she turned into a positive and uplifting experience. She was professional and personable, and made sure I clear on the topics and felt comfortable throughout the process. I could not thank her and the team enough or recommend them more often.

I could not have asked for a better experience working with Nicole DiGiose.   Going though divorce is hard and Nicole was so helpful and knowledgeable, she guided me thought the process with ever bit of confidence.  When it was finalized she over  delivered her promises.  I would highly recommend Nicole to anyone that is in need of a attorney with in the family law sector.

Unfortunately my divorce case did go all the way to trial—something Chris DeMattie and Robert Vossler worked tirelessly to try to avoid on my behalf. Ours, was a tough relocation case. A terrifying first legal experience.
It was my first time being deposed, first time enlisting a Guardian ad litem, first time testifying in front of a judge...and the stakes could not have been higher. Those are SCARY days, made so much more devastating by the emotional toll family transitions take.
It's a heartbreaking time. But at EVERY stage, I felt informed, prepared, heard, prioritized, counseled, and safe. I simply do not understand how Chris and Robb devote this much of themselves to multiple cases at once. They were true partners in this! By the time we got to trial, Chris knew as much about my marriage as I did! If not more! He makes himself an EXPERT on your history, so he can best strategize on the fly, as things inevitably pop up.

Chris is personable and supportive. Whip smart and strategic. Conservatively aggressive, measured beyond belief, and steady as a rock. I don't know if I would've survived this process without him.
Attorney Eric Broder and his team were exceptional throughout my divorce case.  Knowledgeable, experienced, honest, fair,  and leads with seamless guidance.  ~Kimberly DeTomasis

This firm settled a very long standing issue without going to court.
It was complex and they crossed all the “T’s” and dotted every “I”.
They worked as a team (Carole, Ashley and Nicole) and were not only thorough but pleasant and helpful.
I could not have asked for better representation!

Broder Orland Murray & DeMattie LLC is the most elite firm in Fairfield County and the greater region.  Attorney Sue Georgiades managed our case, and was incredibly attentive and diligent.  Her digital response time was immediate, and her explanations of the law were meticulous and thorough.  Georgiades hit the mark at every turn of the road.  It was clear from our family's Filing to the finish line, that she is motivated by the truth, and a standard of excellence in practicing law.  Attorney Georgiades brought our immediate family closer together:  Her comprehension that Settlement and Co-Parenting are indeed a family initiative--not an action of one individual.  The pace and efficiency of her work is demonstrative of the immaculate reputation of the firm.  She was committed to achieving results in a timely manner, while catering to our numerous questions about the short-term & long-term expectations of divorce and co-parenting.  Our family couldn't have imagined a better team--it's clear Georgiades derives her success from an honest passion for her work--our family is forever grateful to have had the opportunity to work with Attorney Georgiades and the Broder Orland Murray & DeMattie firm.

I highly recommend the services of Nicole DiGiose, who was able to navigate me with grace through one of the more difficult times in my life. She was highly communicative, empathetic, and always made sure my expectations were kept in check. I’m extremely happy with every part of my experience with her.

I truly cannot say enough about attorney DiGiose and attorney Chirco. They not only walked me through a difficult time, but fought when I didn't think I had any fight left. Choosing this firm will be one of the best decisions you make. And they way they handled everything with such class was truly remarkable.
Eric Broderbanf Michael were tremendously supportive and helpful in getting through a very difficult divorce process. I would highly recommend them and they did a great job.
I had a very unique divorce with some very specific challenges.  Robert Vossler represented me along with Eric.  They did an amazing job and I would highly recommend them to anyone.

Attorney Christopher DeMattie is a trustworthy, experienced and an excellent attorney. Commutation is excellent as he takes calls directly. Chris is honest and transparent about the process. Our divorce was obtained in a record speed. I highly recommend attorney DeMattie

reviews.text: I have referred several friends and acquaintances to Eric Broder over the years, and literally every single one of them has been served exceedingly well by Mr. Broder.  He is sharp, knowledgable, and effective -- you will get no better representation anywhere.  What's exceptional about Mr. Broder, though, is his innate decency.  He is calm and responsive, getting excellent results for his clients while maintaining respect for the dignitiy of everyone involved.  I couldn't recommend Mr. Broder more heartily.

I feel lucky to have been represented by Anthony Febles and his team. Anthony has a rare combination of being genuinely caring and compassionate, while also being a staunch and unwavering advocate when it came to protecting my interests. From the beginning, he and his team made what could have been a very stressful process feel effortless. Everything was handled efficiently, clearly, and with a level of professionalism that immediately put me at ease. I’m more than happy with both the exceptional outcome and the entire experience. His services were also much more affordable than what I had been quoted by other law practices. I truly felt supported every step of the way and would highly recommend Anthony Febles to anyone looking for outstanding legal representation.
I am very grateful for all your services and for being able to work legally thanks to your work.

​Attorney Anthony Febles is a true legal champion! I couldn't be happier with the outcome of my court case. Thanks to his expertise and dedication, we achieved a successful result. I'm so grateful for his hard work and highly recommend him to anyone in need of a top-notch attorney.

I was seeking new counsel for our existing complex litigation matter. I contacted and spoke with many attorneys and for various reasons, conflict, too late in the game, lack of knowledge, complexity of our case or my gut telling me someone was not the right fit made things extremely challenging to say the least.

While going through this process, attorney Febles and his team heard of our case and my search for new counsel and contacted me. By the grace of God, through our discussions and attorney Febles and his teams thorough review of our case, attorney Febles agreed to take our case on should that be the route I wanted to go. Every challenging moment that led to this made sense to me because I felt in my gut attorney Febles was our guy and that he was!

Attorney Febles and his team became my team. When you are going through a civil process that causes you distress or harm you not only require good and strong counsel representing you, but you also require empathy, honesty and the capability of listening with genuine compassion. You require knowledge and guidance. I received nothing less and only so much more with attorney Febles and his team. They show nothing other than an exceptional level of professionalism and goodwill. This team not only prevailed, but they also carried our weight with them throughout the duration of our matter and saved us.

There are not enough words to express my gratitude to attorney Febles and his team. I can only write a review with hopes it helps to advise someone seeking counsel to contact the Law Office of Attorney Febles while also praising attorney Febles and his team for their outstanding work! Their knowledge of the law and ability to navigate complex legal matters were invaluable.

Very bad experience with Mr. Anthony Febles and his assistant Luke, very low professionalism on their part, so much so that they dropped my case for no reason, they kept $3,000 thousand dollars that they put into an account where they will charge in hours for their services, then out of nowhere they make a report that supposedly goes beyond what was agreed in their fees. From five hours we talked about, they turned into 15 and leaving my case dropped, there was still an outstanding balance of $1,400 that I had to pay them.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Lesly, thank you for your feedback. While we respect every client’s right to share their experience, we do not believe your review accurately reflects the facts or the nature of our work on your matter.
We take all reviews seriously, but we also believe it is important to correct the record when public statements are inaccurate. Our firm is committed to providing high-quality, diligent, and professional legal representation, and we stand by the integrity of our work in every case we accept.
From the outset, we provided clear information regarding our hourly billing structure, including the required retainer and how time would be tracked and applied. All work performed on your matter was thoroughly documented and communicated, and we regularly updated you on both case progress and billing status.
Transparency and client service are core values of our practice, and we are always open to addressing concerns directly. If you would like to further discuss your matter or review the billing history in detail, we welcome you to contact our office.

reviews.text: Hello everyone to my surprise Jamie Lynn, Luca and everyone else at Lemberg Law were Spot On. It was getting pretty hectic and nerve-racking not to mention mental anguish. I had paid my monthly payments on time as usual but each payment for the last 3 months kept coming back NSF, and the day I made the payments speaking with representative and paying the extra $4.95 he gave me confirmation number and told me the payment posted the account so I could come back NSF? Anyway I contacted Lemberg Law and Jamie Lynn was on the case in no time flat. Yes it's simple three questions just for confirmation I confirmed everything and that was it quick easy and sufficient. The whole staff is so proficiently professional it was amazing and courteous and kind nature spoke volumes about their services I would recommend them to anyone. I am so glad that I reached out to them and now I don't have to worry about how to handle the situation even though I'm still receiving calls but that's okay I know behind the scenes Luca and everyone else is on the Job.

reviews.text:
I’m leaving a poor review based on an intake conversation I had with a very dismissive agent. I stated that I had three potential claims I would like to review.

The agent was very curt with poor social skills. The first claim was not something the firm was interested in which I accept and assign no fault for. Because the first claim did not work out, the agent appeared to try to dismiss me from the conversation for the second two potential claims based on what appeared to be a presupposition regarding my value because the first claim did not work out.

I persuaded the agent to remain in the conversation despite his curt dismissal, but the agent did not appear to listen to the subsequent requests because he had already decided he was going to dismiss me as a person completely. He made blanket statements and suggestions which were not true and were frankly rude, suggesting neither I nor another firm I was working with had done due diligence. I had the privilege of working with Sebastian for the recent purchase of my home, and I cannot recommend his services enough. From start to finish, Sebastian exhibited unparalleled professionalism, expertise, and dedication that truly sets him apart.

Sebastian made the stressful process of getting a home much easier.  His knowledge and patience were much appreciated.  He was always available throughout the entire process and the way he explained each step made things easy to understand.  I highly recommend Sebastian Tornatore.
Sebastian did our house closing. He was attentive, kind, courteous, always eager to help!!! Highly recommend him as an attorney with conscious & integrity!!

I couldn't have been happier with the real estate legal services I received from Sebastian Tornatore, Esq. of Tornatore Law, LLC in Norwalk CT. I purchased a condominium in Stamford, CT prior to selling my home on Long Island. Mr. Tornatore negotiated the contract while I was vacationing in Florida and spent an inordinate amount of time going through the multitude of Condo Rules and Regulations and answering innumerable questions. He engaged an excellent inspector and reviewed every portion of the inspection report with me , and was able to get the sellers to fix the major issues raised by the extremely detailed inspection report at no cost to me. Mr. Tornatore also obtained Title Insurance that I requested and recommended an excellent insurance agent and firm for the Connecticut homeowners insurance that was required. In addition, he was always available and extremely responsive---no question was too bothersome, and I had many. I am a retired Partner in a New York City law firm and couldn't have been more pleased with how quickly Mr. Tornatore responded to my phone calls and emails, which has become a rarity these days and was much appreciated. He also efficiently handled every aspect of the contract negotiations and closing. I advised my former law firm colleagues that if their clients needed real estate representation in Fairfield County, including  Greenwich, Riverside, Stamford, Norwalk, Westport and Weston, to please consider Mr. Tornatore. The closing could not have been made easier and the paperwork for a small 2 bedroom condo closing was much more extensive than I could imagine. But Mr. Tornatore was extremely personable and well organized,  and the closing could not have been a more pleasant experience. He also timely provided me with applicable copies of the documents, including the original deed , and title insurance policy. For the reasons described above, I highly recommend Mr. Tornatore for anyone's real estate matters in Fairfield County.
I have worked with Sebastian on multiple real estate transactions. He is professional, hard working, and overall a solid attorney to work with.

I had a great experience Working with Sebastian!  He represented me and guided me through the process of closing on a multi family home. A very good, thorough and experienced law firm.  Sabastian worked closely with me in all details and kept me up-to-date with every move that happened.  Very much recommended!

Sebe Tornatore is a true professional . He has compassion for his job and his clients.  He is smart , kind and patient. He made the transition from our home of 40 years to a condo seamless! We can not thank you enough!

Thanks Sebastian - we will be reaching out when we buy our next home!!

We retained Charles Abate to handle the sale of our home in early 2025. Our experience with him and his colleagues at Abate & Abate was nothing less than exceptional!

From our first introductory call, Charles was articulate, pleasant, and exceedingly professional. He clearly summarized both the closing process and his fee structure in an organized and thoughtful manner, which provided us with the confidence that we were in very capable hands!

Moreover, throughout the entire closing process, his attentiveness and diligence were  without question. At all times, we felt that he represented our interests 100%. To that end, we most certainly will retain Charles for any future real estate matters and highly recommend him to anyone looking for an exceptional attorney!

Attorney Charles Abate is the best representation of professionalism, honesty and excellence in a lawyer since he did an excellent job in our real estate transaction as follows:

•	He protects client’s interest in each part of our real estate transaction, specifically to us as sellers through deep knowledge of Fed, State (CT)/local regs.

•	Very good ability to negotiate and obtain the best conditions for his clients.

•	He performed contract drafting and review, putting it together in a clear and simple fashion, avoiding potential future disputes and legal risks.

•	He verified and investigated, confirming there were no impediments or legal restrictions.

• Transactions were done in a safe and thorough (following regs and laws) manner.

In summary, he was the best recommendation we got from our real estate agent since he has ample similar experience in these transactions, is detail oriented and has a very good reputation. We amply recommend him.

Our experience with Chas couldn't have been better. He was entirely on top of everything, communicated clearly and promptly and gave us peace of mind that even if we missed something, he wouldn't. And he didn't! Highly recommend

Chas was fantastic in our closing.   It was a long drawn out sale with lots of contingencies, but Chas kept us informed, explained any quirky legal angles and kept us calm throughout.   When our buyers could not close in time of the original date, Chas negotiated a fair daily compensation, which helped to ease our stress during the long wait to closing.   Ultimately we closed without a hitch.   Highly recommend Chas, white glove service all the way.

reviews.text: The Maddox Law Firm and Attorney James Miron in particular have worked tirelessly for over 2 years to get justice for my father. They have gone above and beyond to make the process as easy and straight forward as possible and to allow my father the space to focus on his health as a result of his accident. Attorney Miron has been a godsend when it came time to get ready for depositions, mediations, etc. Always available to answer our questions and concerns. He put us at ease throughout the legal process. My family is very grateful for his unwavering support throughout my father's case. He has shown exceptional commitment. Attorney Miron showed a deep understanding of my father's personal situation and demonstrated empathy throughout the legal process. He was able to negotiate a very advantageous out-of-court settlement for my father, avoiding a long and costly trial. His negotiating skills are impressive. He made my family feel like we were part of his close circle of friends and knew that he was fighting to secure the best outcome on my father's behalf. With Maddox Law Firm and Attorney Miron in your corner you can be sure that justice will prevail.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience with The Maddox Law Firm and Attorney James Miron. Your kind words mean a lot to us and we are grateful for the opportunity to help you and your family during this challenging time.

reviews.text: My first time feeling so good about any organization.   This firm deserves shinning stars for fantastic clear communication with follow up along every step in my case. From the moment I call the office she returned my call in less than an hour.

From the surgery and the year recuperation I had was not easy. But thankfully the benefits and support from her entire team was never absent.

I’m thankful with God and life for putting her in my path to be able to overcome this terrible accident.
If your reading this with the same doubts I had in 2021 I don’t blame you but now in 2023 that the case has settle Im just thankful for had made the right choice.

Ryan O’Neil was truly a lifesaver for our family. My son was accused of extremely serious misconduct by more than one accuser, and the situation initially felt overwhelming. Ryan skillfully used technology and evidence to fully clear my son’s name in both the civil and criminal matters.
Just as important as his legal expertise was Ryan’s calm, measured approach throughout the process. During an incredibly stressful time, he reassured our family, stayed focused on the facts, and helped us believe that the truth would ultimately come out. What seemed like an impossible situation ended with the best possible outcome. Ryan was honest from the beginning about how difficult the case could be, but he also made it clear that he would do everything in his power to ensure that a rare but very real situation would not destroy our lives.

We are deeply grateful for his dedication, professionalism, and compassion.

Caitlin M Sell, My family and I would like to thank you for all that you have done for us during this most unbelievably stressful time. Your work ethic, analytical thinking, and excellent representation solved our dilemmas and then went far and beyond any expectations. There is no other lawyer that we would rather have in our corner. Please know that you are much appreciated.

He gave such a detailed consultation about everything I needed to do just in case I did this on my own. I have a complicated DV case as the victim. I know he’d fight super hard for you and for me. It’s 1000% worth it.

Going through a Title IX case at an Ivy League school is one of the most stressful experiences a student can have. I remember when my son was first served with his complaint, and he told me he felt that everything he had ever worked for was about to be taken away from him because of something that he didn't do. We found Mark's firm through a family friend, and after meeting with a few different firms, we chose Mark as our counsel given that he always presented us with the truth and helped us face realities head-on, no matter how difficult or scary those realities were.

Honesty, communication, and collaboration were always what set Mark apart from everyone else we spoke with. We truly credit him with saving our son's career and his entire future. Throughout such a stressful process, there really is nobody our family would recommend more for you to have by your side. I truly believe that we wouldn't be in the position we are today without Mark's help.

Mark always worked personally with our family in a way that went above and beyond every expectation. From serving as a level-headed guide throughout an emotionally charged process to dissecting every detail in the investigation report with the highest level of care and competence, he always gave the best possible counsel and presented us with every option. He was never afraid to take on the university if necessary and made absolutely certain that it was a fair process from start to finish.

Mark's firm will connect you with a full suite of resources, from private investigators to therapists, but notably, you will always have the high level of partner involvement and a personal touch that you likely I will not get from working with a larger firm. This gives you the best of both worlds, and is just one of the many reasons that I would, unequivocally and with the utmost confidence, recommend Mark Sherman and his firm.

Caitlin Sell & Mark Sherman (as well as the whole firm) are an incredible team.  From the very beginning, they were always available (weekends, nights) & so patient with me.  I faced an unexpected & tough legal situation and they held my hand every step of the way.  They saw me through tears & setbacks and I never once felt judged.  Caitlin was my main point of contact & a true gem.  Her ability to work with judges, prosecutors & other stakeholders is truly top notch.  Consequences, outcomes, & processes were always fully explained to me.  When I or my family had questions, we were met with patience.  Caitlin is thorough, genuine, honest, supportive, extremely knowledgable, and acted with the upmost integrity.  She’s truly remarkable.  Even with a number of violations, Caitlin led me to the best possible outcome I could have imagined.

Lastly, not only did they help me legally, they connected me with community support & resources who helped me through a very tough time.

I could not be more thankful for their incredible support & understanding during a very difficult time.  I wholeheartedly believe I would not be where I am today without Caitlin or Mark.

They handled my case very smoothly, they listened to any and all concerns and walked me through the process every step of the way. I am happy with the turnout as they got the case dropped and you definitely get what you pay for going through them. They talked me through different possibilities and outcomes and made sure I was aware and understood everything that was going on as well as making sure to check in before needing to appear at court to prepare you for what’s next. If you are seeking an attorney I would highly suggest hiring this firm.

You never feel rushed or dismissed, and they take the time to explain everything clearly while advocating fiercely on your behalf. In an incredibly stressful process, their professionalism, integrity, and compassion make all the difference.

I hope I never need an attorney again, but if I did, I will not hesitate to reach out to Attorney Juliana Velez from The Law Offices of Mark Sherman. - Kay
I have court tomorrow and had serious questions! Called this office early in the morning and got an answer immediately! Mark gave me lots of advice and told me what to do so grateful!!

I needed a lawyer after a DUI arrest, and this office was recommended to me. I’ll share some details of my case for anyone my review might help. I know I was scrolling through this page too when I was first considering whether getting a lawyer was the right move for me. Mark got back to me promptly after I reached out, asked me to explain the details of my arrest, and helped me weigh the pros and cons of hiring his firm given my circumstances with great honesty, which I really appreciated. I made some rookie mistakes at the time of my arrest (like admitting I had been drinking), but I was also barely over the .08 limit.

At the end of the day, two major factors made hiring someone the best choice for me. First, I really didn’t want to risk a license suspension or an interlock device in my car if it could be avoided. Second, trust me, this process is beyond complicated and stressful to handle alone. Everyone’s case is different, and your BAC level along with other factors you wouldn’t even think of can really affect how things ultimately play out for you. It’s not only smart but emotionally reassuring to have a team of people who know what they’re doing handle the hard work and have your back throughout the process, knowing you’ve done everything you can for yourself and your case.

Juliana was my primary point of contact and was assigned to the criminal side of my case. Caitlin handled the DMV side of things. Both of these ladies were an absolute pleasure to work with and were very transparent with me from day one. Juliana went above and beyond to keep me informed of every detail, tracked all my deadlines (IID install, paperwork, classes, you name it), and handled every court appearance while I did the rest (which was very little) virtually. Without their help, I honestly feel I could’ve missed deadlines and dragged the whole process out even longer. Yes, the headache can turn into a nightmare by missing small deadlines or making small mistakes, and if you’re juggling a lot in your normal life, that’s a real risk. They provided amazing moral support and were incredibly patient with me through the whole ordeal. My case was eventually dismissed in court.

If you’re weighing your options about whether you need assistance in a similar situation, I highly recommend taking the first step and just reaching out. The entire team is incredibly friendly and kind, and they will talk you through your options. Nothing to lose by just taking that first step. And to the firm, thank you again to everyone for all of your hard work and help!

I am truly fortunate to know Mark and incredibly grateful to have him in my corner.

Highly attentive, endlessly responsive, and apparently on a first-name basis with half the judicial system. This is definitely the lawyer you want when life gets messy. 10/10 would recommend!

Keller law was absolutely wonderful. I worked with Robin and Dani during our time in Connecticut to improve my son’s education. Before working with Keller Law my son had spent 3 years in a “special school” our school district outplaced us with. In his time there he made no educational progress and by end of 2nd grade was still operating at a pre-k level educationally. After only a month of working with Dani she helped me to gather the information and present to my district so we could get him to a better school. At this new school my son was able to catch up to be almost at grade level in most subjects. They continued to support us ensuring my son’s IEP had appropriate and specific goals outlined. When it came time for us to move out of state they helped me research to find resources in my new state, gave me guidance on the process, and ensured the IEP had everything we could possibly add to ensure my son was placed appropriately in our new state.  They listened to me every step of the way and never pushed anything on us that I was not onboard with. I know we would not be where we are today if it wasn’t for Robin and Dani. If you are looking for an advocate or education attorney look no further this is the place to go. I could not be more grateful for this team. Thank you ladies!

reviews.text:
Getting what your child needs out of a school system is a battle, no matter how well-intended or wonderful your school may seem, but for Alissa Olivier-Mann, it is one she is well qualified to negotiate.
Alissa knew exactly what we should do to get the best outcome for my child and executed it with precision. Her mere mention makes meetings happen so fast, you would think she was offering gifts like Oprah.
And in these meetings, full of educators, therapists, psychologists, PhD’s, and administrators, Alissa commands the room, and rightfully so. Her preparation makes a well-intentioned team stumble.
She entered my child’s IEP meeting having studied our 4-year SPED history—not just the current year but all FOUR years: every test, every amendment, every revision, and every report. Her ability to rapid-fire information is only second to her knowledge of the Special Education System, and any current or pending legislation that may change these rules (and the dates it would take effect).
Alissa is on top of everything and it shows. All of this, and the questions she asked about my child’s IEP—she provided both an educated solution and a timeline to accomplish it, with which everyone on my child’s team agreed.
Impressive is an understatement, and I am so grateful to have this Warrior Queen of all things Special Education on my side.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Katharyn, Thank you so much for the recognition of Alissa's high level of advocacy. I learn from her every day! She has such a deep knowledge of CT special education law and procedures. Couple that with her ability to "deep dive " into a student's educational records she can and does speak with unquestionable knowledge on what the student needs NOW-TOMORROW as well as developing a strategic plan moving forward through collaboration with the districts and parents.

Again, thank you for the kind words!

reviews.text: Robin is a fantastic lawyer to represent your wants and needs for your child. I am the mother of a child who is identified with Autism, Disruptive Mood Dysregulation Disorder, and ADHD. Before he was identified my son was in a public school setting. I kept asking for support for my son because I had believed that there was something he wasn't processing. I asked first in kindergarten and was told that it was a maturity issue and that he would be placed through the SRBI process. Then I asked again in first grade where he was tested and identified with a reading disability. I asked for OT and was told he did not have sensory problems. Then the hardest year came upon us second grade. This grade my son unraveled and I was not getting any support from the school system. Finally I reached out to Robin P. Keller not knowing what to expect. She accepted my case and thoroughly read everything the school had on file. At my first PPT with her I did not have to do much talking because she knew so much about the support that my son needed, she provided the team with questions that were supported by what she read and her extensive background knowledge, and she was the domino effect I needed. Immediately following the PPT I began looking at programs that would work for my son. He was identified with Autism and at the follow up meeting she fought to have his Education classification changed, immediately. Robin educated me through this process and I learned so much that I am now able to advocate for my son myself. However because of her knowledge and expertise in the field my son is now in a school that provides him the necessary daily support. He is has a implemented sensory diet. He is working with a team that I also am happy with. Robin open the doors for appropriate support my son when she took on my case. She represented my sons best interest and fought for them. I gladly recommend Robin P. Keller!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you!  You are a warrior Mom!

I would have given no stars if I could but I had to select at least one. I’ve been very disappointed with my experience at this law firm.
